item.title: Slides as Code: Integrating Reveal.js into my Hugo Blog
item.description: For a long time, I wanted a way to host my technical presentations directly on my website without relying on external platforms or bulky PDF exports. I wanted a “Slides as Code” approach: version-controlled Markdown files that live natively alongside my blog posts.
